parameters.content: Webhook path: /webhook/no-show-sync. The Google Sheet add-on can POST month/year, or the workflow can read them from Automation!A:B. Share both sheets with n8n-portfolio@operating-bolt-453212-b6.iam.gserviceaccount.com.

This workflow appends only columns A:G, leaving A:B blank because current source columns do not expose a reliable quarter or duty location. `TECHNICAL DIRECTOR` is filled from source `Production Director` per user request.
